description: Lap 1 rewrites seed/dpa.md to add the two missing mandatory Art.28(3) terms: Sub-Processor and Audit. All other terms are left untouched, so check_dpa.py exits 0 on lap 1. Demonstrates the canonical loop reaching DONE with zero API keys and zero external tools.

interactions.agent_output: Ran check_dpa.py: 2 mandatory Art.28(3) terms missing — Sub-Processor and Audit. Adding a Sub-Processor section covering engagement and flow-down of obligations, and an Audit section granting the controller audit and inspection rights. Not touching the checker or any existing term.

actions.content:
# Data Processing Agreement

This Data Processing Agreement ("DPA") supplements the underlying services
agreement between Controller and Processor and governs the processing of
personal data carried out by Processor on behalf of Controller.

## Subject Matter of Processing

This DPA covers the processing of personal data necessary for Processor to
provide the hosting and analytics services described in the underlying
services agreement.

## Duration of Processing

Processing shall continue for the term of the underlying services
agreement and shall cease upon termination, subject to the data return and
deletion provisions herein.

## Nature and Purpose of Processing

The nature of the processing includes storage, retrieval, and analysis of
personal data for the purpose of providing the contracted services to
Controller.

## Type of Personal Data and Categories of Data Subjects

The personal data processed includes contact details and usage data
relating to Controller's employees and end users.

## Obligations of the Controller

Controller shall ensure it has a valid legal basis for the processing and
shall provide instructions to Processor consistent with applicable data
protection law.

## Sub-Processor

Processor shall not engage a sub-processor to carry out any processing
activities without prior specific or general written authorization from
Controller. Where a sub-processor is engaged, Processor shall impose on
that sub-processor, by way of contract, data protection obligations no
less protective than those set out in this DPA, and Processor shall
remain fully liable to Controller for the sub-processor's performance.

## Confidentiality

Processor shall ensure that persons authorized to process personal data
have committed themselves to confidentiality or are under an appropriate
statutory obligation of confidentiality.

## Security Measures

Processor shall implement appropriate technical and organizational
measures to ensure a level of security appropriate to the risk, including
encryption, access controls, and regular testing of such measures.

## Audit

Processor shall make available to Controller all information necessary to
demonstrate compliance with this DPA and shall allow for and contribute
to audits, including inspections, conducted by Controller or an auditor
mandated by Controller, on reasonable prior notice and no more than once
per year absent a security incident.

interactions.notes: The fix — check_dpa.py now exits 0. bl run reaches DONE on lap 1, keyless, no external tool.

interactions.agent_output: Fix already applied; no further changes needed.
interactions.notes: Fallback for any lap beyond 1 — should not be reached in the happy path.
